Friends with Money (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,368,437Details
International Box Office $4,741,715
Worldwide Box Office $18,110,152
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,179,225
Total $8,179,225
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$589,332 (4.4% of total gross)
Legs:4.21 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:73.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,500,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:28 opening theaters/1,010 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $24,410,157

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 7th, 2006 (Limited) by Sony Pictures Classics
April 21st, 2006 (Expands Wide) by Sony Pictures Classics
Video Release: August 29th, 2006 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, some sexual content and brief drug use.
Running Time: 88 minutes
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Sony Pictures Classics, This is That
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
